_comment: Live build state. Primary writes on every state transition.

2_1_embedding_pipeline.notes: sqlite-vec 0.1.9, tiktoken 0.12.0. _load_sqlite_vec added to both connect() and migrate(). Ollama uses /api/embeddings + prompt (v0.20.7).

2_2_classify_book_skill.notes: surfaced claude -p invocation gotcha: bare `claude -p <skill>` treats JSON as conversational; correct shape is `claude -p --system-prompt-file SKILL.md --model haiku`. Pinned into build/pins/claude-code.md. Also fixed brittle schema_version count assertion in test_sqlite_vec_loaded.py (was hardcoded to 2; now compares before/after).

2_3_bluesky.notes: atproto==0.0.65 pinned. Client must be reused after login() — can't hand off accessJwt to a second Client. Cached in _CLIENT_CACHE.

2_4_library_watcher.notes: real library scan found 98 supported files (56 epub, 29 pdf, 8 mobi, 5 azw3, 1 chm skipped). One-epub smoke produced 61 chunks+embeddings+vec0 rows. CALIBRE NOT INSTALLED — 13 mobi/azw3 books will fail at worker time; install from calibre-ebook.com or use email-export fallback.

2_5_kindle_scraper.notes: pycookiecheat==0.8.0 wired (make kindle-cookies-refresh) reads Chrome cookies live via Keychain; no manual export. Selector bumped to 2026-04-15.1 — Amazon uses bare ASIN as id, not prefixed form. Real backfill not yet run.

2_6_storygraph_csv.notes: Real import landed 619 storygraph_entry rows from user's CSV (747 total, 122 to-read filtered out). Authors field is pipe-separated; importer preserves raw string.

2_7_book_note_skills.notes: hardened SKILL.md with 'first character must be #' after haiku preamble leak

3_1_article_handler.notes: Trafilatura paywall guard: 200-char min body or ArticleExtractionError. trafilatura.fetch_url returns None on failure → ArticleFetchError. Source-id dedup on canonical URL (fragment-stripped); content-hash fallback for same article under different URL.

gates.live_smoke: skipped — would consume chat-typed app password

3_2_bluesky_url_handler.notes: Reuses bluesky_auth (same scope as Phase 2). get_post_thread(depth=10, parent_height=10). Idempotent on canonical AT URI. <30-char replies dropped (main post kept regardless). NotFoundPost/BlockedPost descendants silently skipped; main post not-found raises BlueskyUrlError. Quote posts NOT rendered (embed.record traversal punted). Rate-limit handling punted to later hardening.

3_3_summarize_capture_skill.smoke: 3/3 live haiku passes (article 2563w, podcast 3166w, youtube 2440w); bullets 7/8/7, quotes 4/4/4; no preamble leak; no fabricated quotes
3_3_summarize_capture_skill.parser_entry: from skills.summarize_capture.parser import parse, verify_quotes, should_summarize
3_3_summarize_capture_skill.notes: Output format: YAML frontmatter + markdown body with required sections # Summary / ## Key points / ## Quotes. Preamble guard: 'first character must be -'. 2000-word threshold kept. claude-code pin (2.1.109) unchanged.

3_4_youtube_handler.notes: Shared transcription.py created (faster-whisper 1.1.1, lazy model cache, _model test override). Caption quality heuristic: punctuation density + repetition + word-rate. VTT cleaning. URL normalization covers watch/youtu.be/shorts/embed + playlist-param strip.

3_5_podcast_handler.notes: RSS discovery: HTML link tag + Apple Podcasts API fallback. feedparser exposes podcast:transcript via podcast_transcript attr. SRT/VTT/plain text transcript formats auto-detected. Spotify → always Whisper (no public RSS). URL normalization strips utm_*/fbclid/gclid.

3_6_image_handler.notes: Tesseract 5.5.2 works. Three input modes (path, base64, URL). OCR empty flag <50 chars. Supported: JPEG, PNG, WEBP, TIFF, BMP, GIF. Image preserved at captures/YYYY/MM/images/. Tip for 3.7: --psm 6 or --psm 11 for video keyframes.

3_7_video_handler.suite_failures_note: 3 failures in test_podcast_handler.py (parallel agent 3.5 still writing files — race condition, not regression)
3_7_video_handler.notes: Keyframe OCR with --psm 11. Jaccard dedup at 0.85. Files >2GB skip OCR. Graceful degradation: if audio fails but OCR succeeds (or vice versa), still produces output. Temp cleanup via TemporaryDirectory context manager.

3_8_capture_dispatcher_refactor.notes: 11 HANDLERS keys. Smart dispatch on kind. Unknown kind → vault fallback. Inbox → processed/ after success.

3_9_search_commonplace_tool.notes: Unified semantic search. KNN via sqlite-vec vec0. Post-KNN filtering with 5x overfetch. Returns score/doc_id/content_type/source_id/chunk_text/created_at. Ollama-down → error dict, not crash.

open_questions: 2.5 Kindle: real backfill green-light? (waits on library Ollama drain)
2.3 Bluesky: real backfill green-light? (waits on library Ollama drain) + rotate the chat-typed app password
3.6 Image OCR: install tesseract via `brew install tesseract`? Blocks 3.6 and OCR pass of 3.7.
3.4/3.5/3.7 Whisper engine: confirm faster-whisper (recommended; CTranslate2, ~4x on M1, pip-only) or pick openai-whisper.

blocked.reason: library Ollama drain still in progress (worker pid 74073)
soft block — whisper engine choice (defaults to faster-whisper if no answer by wave 2 dispatch)
soft block — whisper engine choice + tesseract

decisions_made.summary: hybrid chunker (paragraph→512/64 window), sqlite-vec vec0 virtual table, 768-dim nomic-embed-text
